section.title: 339+ reviews, 4.3 average.
section.subtitle: A sample of what clients across Basti say after their appointment.

testimonials.name: Anjali Srivastava
testimonials.quote: My trial sitting looked exactly like the final wedding look. Nothing was left to chance on the day.

testimonials.name: Priya Gupta
testimonials.quote: The hair spa alone fixed frizz I'd been fighting for two years. Booking monthly now.

testimonials.name: Ritu Chaurasia
testimonials.quote: Keratin result held for four months even through the Basti summer. Worth every rupee.

testimonials.name: Meera Pandey
testimonials.quote: Dedicated artist, no rushing, and they stayed for touch-ups through the reception.

testimonials.name: Kavita Yadav
testimonials.quote: Honest advice — they told me which facial I didn't need instead of upselling.

google.summary: Consistently rated for punctuality, hygiene, and bridal artistry across Basti.
